- Carl Reiner: Directed 'Summer Rental', 'The Man with Two Brains', "Where's Poppa?", 'Summer School', "Dead Men Don't Wear Plaid", 'That Old Feeling', 'Oh, God!', 'Fatal Instinct', 'All of Me', 'Sibling Rivalry', 'The Jerk'.
- Wim Wenders: Directed 'Buena Vista Social Club', 'Alice in the Cities', 'The Million Dollar Hotel', "The Goalie's Anxiety at the Penalty Kick", 'The American Friend', 'Kings of the Road', 'Palermo Shooting', 'The Salt of the Earth', 'Wings of Desire', 'Until the End of the World', 'Paris, Texas', 'The End of Violence', 'Tokyo-Ga', 'The Scarlet Letter', 'The State of Things', 'Room 666', 'Hammett', 'Land of Plenty', 'Beyond the Clouds', "Don't Come Knocking", 'Pina', 'Lisbon Story', 'Faraway, So Close!'.
